expectations.text: Identifies the two business flows that are actually present in the code: user registration (register controller -> UserService -> UserRepository) and payment webhook handling (webhook controller -> PaymentService).
Does not invent flows that are absent from the code (e.g. authentication, refunds, notifications, reporting) — every flow it names is traceable to an entry point in the fixture source.
Persists each flow as its own separate file under .context/flows/ (one file per flow, kebab-case), and does not produce a single aggregated all-flows document.
Each flow file traces the real path through the actual files (controller -> service -> repository) using concrete file paths from the fixture.
